import poionakoLogo from "../assets/img/poionakologo.png"; const getAvatarFromPlatform = (platform, username) => { const safeUser = String(username || "").trim().toLowerCase(); if (!safeUser) return return safeUrl; return `https://${safeUrl}`; }; const getPlatformLabel = (url) => { const clean = String(url || "").toLowerCase(); if (clean.includes("twitch.tv")) return "Twitch"; if
